reviews.review_description: Firenze is Italy's most beautiful and rich city, rich in every sense. In this immersive app, you can dive into this richness and get lost... So many prominent and superb architectural beauties that tell stories from the past, so many sacred places, unique, great artworks. In the crypt of santa reparata I understood how the Florentine people admire their past, their achievements, their rich cultural heritage and preserve it for generations to come, from all over the world.
